title: Personal Space
description: Gradually hide players who get too close. Fully configurable!
body:
Gradually hide players that get within a certain distance of you. Useful on potentially crowded servers like Hypixel.
Minimum distance and maximum distance, as well as minimum opacity, are fully configurable by editing `personal_space.json` in the `config` directory of your game. Distances are in blocks, and opacity is as a percentage out of 100.
